docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-18-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POON, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMANSKIY, VLADIMIR $3,261.62 PRINCIPAL, $152.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,413.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMANSKIY, VLADIMIR
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ZAMANSKIY, VLADIMIR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-06-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMANSKIY, VLADIMIR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VIVIAN CHOY INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.
